response: The professional footballer who played for Kadji Sports Academy as a youth and went on to be the most decorated African player of all time is Samuel Eto'o. Eto'o played for Kadji Sports Academy during his youth and later represented Cameroon national football team. He is the most decorated African player of all time, having won the African Player of the Year award a record four times: in 2003, 2004, 2005, and 2010.
